title: Specified work — Working Holiday visa (subclass 417)
text: To be eligible for a second Working Holiday visa you must complete 88 days (3 months) of specified work in a specified industry and regional area while on your first visa.

title: Tax file number — Australian Taxation Office
text: A tax file number (TFN) is free and you can apply online after you arrive in Australia. Give your TFN to your employer to avoid being taxed at the higher no-TFN rate.

title: Minimum wages — Fair Work Ombudsman
text: Most employees in Australia are covered by a minimum wage and award conditions. Working holiday makers have the same workplace rights; unpaid wages can be reported to the Fair Work Ombudsman.
